description_for_human: AI operating system — your device, your data, your agents.
description_for_model: BlackRoad OS is an AI operating system built on Raspberry Pi hardware with 52 TOPS local inference. Products: Lucidia (AI companion $20/mo), RoadWork (education $9.99/mo), Canvas/Video/Writing Studio (creator tools), RoadChain (blockchain), RoundTrip (69 agents). Delaware C-Corp, $29-299/month.
